analysis_basis: manual visual analysis of project reference still

framing.subject_crop: medium close-up to medium shot; shoulders and upper torso visible
framing.face_position: left subject face centered near x=0.23,y=0.28; right subject face centered near x=0.74,y=0.30
framing.panel_order_rule: preserve conversation-role order; interviewer left when included

entity_explainer.body: white card with dense black Japanese text

render_directives: Use for short term/entity explanations during a focused two-person exchange.
Keep faces above the explainer card and outside the top logo/title band.
Crop each panel so eyes sit in the upper third and microphones/hands remain visible when context matters.
